overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character in a leather coat through a futuristic cyberpunk version of Camden Market in London. The character walks from a wet asphalt street under a colorful neon sign, through narrow cobblestone alleys lined with graffiti and market stalls, and emerges into an open plaza featuring a large EXOMOD statue with purple neon lighting. The environment features high-fidelity Unreal Engine 5 graphics with ray-traced reflections on wet surfaces.

A black sedan passes by as the character crosses the road, and a flying drone is visible overhead. The environment transitions from the open street to the entrance of a cobblestone market area.

The camera looks up at a metal archway overhead while following a character with a skull-design jacket. The cylindrical glass tower remains visible in the background as the alley narrows.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a semi-covered market street lined with clothing stalls and vendor carts. Fabric canopies provide shelter overhead as pedestrians browse the merchandise. The environment features green market stalls and various graffiti art on the walls.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza with direct sunlight, leaving the covered market behind. The scene features pink storefronts and a large brick warehouse building. The character approaches a prominent EXOMOD statue installation with purple neon lighting and digital billboards, which serves as a focal point in the market square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban street into the dense corridors of a cyberpunk market before emerging into a sunlit open plaza. It begins under a vibrant neon Camden sign on a wet asphalt road, passing a black sedan and a flying drone as the camera transitions from the open street toward a cobblestone entrance. As the character enters a narrow alley, the view shifts upward toward a metal archway and a distant cylindrical glass tower, moving past walls layered with stickers and vertical banners. The scene then flows into a semi-covered market street where fabric canopies and green vendor stalls create a sheltered corridor lined with graffiti and browsing pedestrians. Finally, the camera breaks out from the covered stalls into a wide, sun-drenched plaza featuring pink storefronts and a brick warehouse, coming to a stop before a towering EXOMOD statue illuminated by purple neon and digital billboards.
